overview: West Coast Men's Health provides evidence-based medical care for men's sexual health, hormone balance, nerve health, and overall wellness in a clinical setting under the direction of Dr. Jonathan Hodor. Treatment is personalized and designed to support long-term health and daily function.
highlights: Acoustic Wave Therapy for erectile dysfunction and neuropathy
TRT available in injections, gels, and pellets
Nerve Reviver for at-home neuropathy support
targetAudience: Men experiencing age-related changes in sexual health, hormone balance, nerve health, and mobility.
